si.t: FOCS_SupF01 : TAR UMT Industrial Training Supervisor’s Evaluation on Student
INDUSTRIAL TRAINING SUPERVISOR’S EVALUATION ON STUDENT
(a) Please evaluate the student trainee using the rating scale provided.
(b) For each criteria, use the pull-down menu to select a rating. Score is automatically calculated (grey shade).
(c) Save in PDF format and upload to GDrive folder designated by Course Coordinator.
Date of receipt of progress reports (DD/MM/YYYY)
No submission or poorly written reports
Description of technical work done is too brief/insufficient with many grammatical and spelling mistakes
Description of technical work done is average and sufficient with some grammatical and spelling mistakes
Description of technical work done is adequate with negligible grammatical and spelling mistakes
Description of technical work done is excellent with negligible or no grammatical and spelling mistakes
Date of receipt of final report (DD/MM/YYYY) :
No submission or poorly presented final report
Poorly structured, difficult to read and many grammatical and spelling mistakes
Averagely structured, fairly easy to read with some grammatical and spelling mistakes
Good structure, easy to read with minor grammatical and spelling mistakes
Excellent structure, easy to read, excellent grammar and corrrect spelling
Awareness of business and entrepreneurial opportunities (CLO5)
No submission or evidence in report on this awareness
One or two statements in report on this awareness
Description is vague and awareness is not well highlighted
Description is good and awareness is well highlighted
Excellent description and awareness is strongly emphasized
No submission or poorly written final report
Too brief, poorly written and lack of explanation
Apply knowledge and understanding on the development and implementation of software systems in the real world. (C3, PLO2)
Apply technical skills in a real-world business environment. (P4, PLO3)
Able to function effectively as a member or leader of a team in the working environment (A2, PLO4)
Demonstrate commitment in work assigned (A3, PLO9)
Demonstrate awareness of business opportunities and entrepreneurship in the real-world business environment. (A3, PLO10)
Demonstrates good ethics and professionalism in the working environment. (A2, PLO11)
